commands.review_summary:
The PR changes lean `openclaw status --json` scanning to use generated/lazy channel metadata, skips channel secret/plugin validation on that path, updates bundled channel config metadata, and adjusts signed-thinking transcript repair rules.

PR surface: Source +256, Tests +79, Generated +5, Other +67. Total +407 across 22 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source/proof level: the linked report and PR body identify `openclaw status --json` repeatedly scanning bundled plugin metadata under `dist/extensions`, and the PR proof shows a packaged Linux run with zero `/dist/extensions/` `statx` hits. I did not run a live repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The remaining decision is maintainer review of proof and compatibility/session-state risk, not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: Fix status JSON plugin scan
target.body:
## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `openclaw status --json` no longer performs the bundled plugin package metadata walk under `dist/extensions` when the generated channel catalog and lean JSON status path already provide the needed read-only status data.

Real environment tested: Linux VM, `Linux 6.17.0-19-generic aarch64 GNU/Linux`, Node `v24.15.0`, npm `11.12.1`, packed tarball `openclaw-2026.5.26.tgz` installed into an isolated prefix.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
corepack pnpm build
corepack pnpm pack --pack-destination "$WORK/pack"
npm install -g --prefix "$PREFIX" "$WORK/pack/openclaw-2026.5.26.tgz"
HOME="$HOME_DIR" \
OPENCLAW_HOME="$HOME_DIR" \
OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR="$STATE" \
OPENCLAW_CONFIG_PATH="$STATE/openclaw.json" \
NO_COLOR=1 \
strace -f -e trace=statx -o "$PROOF_ROOT/status.strace" \
  timeout 12s "$PREFIX/bin/openclaw" status --json --timeout 3000 \
  >"$PROOF_ROOT/status.json" 2>"$PROOF_ROOT/status.stderr"
```

Evidence after fix:

```text
command=timeout 12s openclaw status --json --timeout 3000
exit=0 elapsed_ms=2543 json_ok=yes
statx_total=7744 dist_extensions_statx_hits=0 plugin_metadata_trace_hits=24
stderr_bytes=0
json_top_level_keys=agents,channelSummary,gateway,gatewayService,heartbeat,memory,memoryPlugin,nodeService,os,queuedSystemEvents,runtimeVersion,secretDiagnostics,sessions,taskAudit,tasks,update,updateChannel,updateChannelSource
```

Observed result after fix: the packaged Linux command exits successfully within the timeout, emits parseable JSON, writes no stderr, and has zero `statx` hits for `/dist/extensions/`.

What was not tested: gateway startup was not smoke-tested because this change does not touch gateway startup or gateway container lifecycle code.

## Summary

- Prefer the generated bundled channel catalog when it exists, falling back to bundled package metadata only when the generated catalog is unavailable.
- Keep the lean `status --json` path off plugin validation, configured-channel plugin discovery, and channel secret target discovery unless the richer status paths explicitly ask for them.
- Avoid pre-route config/plugin loading for known built-in CLI commands before dispatch.

Fixes #86780

## Verification

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/bundled-channel-catalog-read.test.ts src/channels/bundled-channel-catalog-read.fail-soft.test.ts src/channels/ids.test.ts src/commands/status.scan.fast-json.test.ts src/commands/status.scan-overview.test.ts src/commands/status.summary.test.ts src/cli/command-secret-targets.import.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/route.test.ts src/cli/program/routes.test.ts src/commands/status.scan.config-shared.test.ts src/cli/command-secret-gateway.test.ts src/channels/plugins/read-only.test.ts src/plugins/plugin-metadata-snapshot.memo.test.ts src/commands/status.scan.fast-json.test.ts src/cli/command-secret-targets.import.test.ts src/commands/status.summary.test.ts src/commands/status.scan-overview.test.ts src/cli/run-main.test.ts src/cli/run-main.exit.test.ts src/commands/status-json.test.ts src/commands/status-json-command.test.ts src/channels/bundled-channel-catalog-read.test.ts src/channels/bundled-channel-catalog-read.fail-soft.test.ts src/channels/ids.test.ts
pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/channels/bundled-channel-catalog-read.ts src/channels/bundled-channel-catalog-read.test.ts src/cli/command-secret-targets.import.test.ts src/cli/command-secret-targets.ts src/cli/run-main.ts src/commands/status-runtime-shared.ts src/commands/status.scan-overview.ts src/commands/status.scan.fast-json.test.ts src/commands/status.scan.fast-json.ts src/commands/status.summary.ts src/config/io.ts
git diff --check
```
